title: Bolsius Rustic Pillar Candle - Ivory- Pack of 4 - Long Burning Time of 60 Hours - Household Candle - Interior Decoration - Unscented - Natural Vegan Wax - No Palm Oil - 130 x 70 mm
features: Bolsius's rustic pillar candle coming in the white tone Cloudy White boasts a full 13cm in height and burns for a good 60 hours
The clear white colour of Cloudy White will give your interiors a fresh accent and is a real bridging colour
The mark of a quality candle is its long burning time and its use of the best raw materials
Every Bolsius candle is made with skilled craftsmanship and with a sharp focus on quality. The candles don't soot and there's no smoulder or smoke when you burn the candles
We love to keep on creating magical moments for you and future generations. That’s why we pioneer with either olive, rapeseed or sunflower oil from Europe
